description.value:
Your training has taught you skills that are difficult for others to replicate. At level 1, based on the path you've chosen as a Geisha, you gain the following:

  • Dancer: You've mastered the ability to move your body with precision, grace, and elegance. You can choose to either add Combo or Finisher to one of your Taijutsu.
    Combo allows you to use a finisher as a bonus action, regardless of its casting time, but only with jutsu that have a target or area.
    Finisher allows you to use the taijutsu after performing a combo, also as a bonus action, regardless of casting time.
    You can use this once per turn.
    Alternatively, you can add Chain X to one of your Bukijutsu, which can also be used once per turn.

  • Strategic: Your training in intellectual games like shogi allows you to mold chakra in a unique way.
    You gain a special type of molding that doesn't count towards your normal limit. This is Elemental Empowerment, which adds one rank of a specific status to your jutsu based on the element used: Fire causes Burn, Cold causes Chilled, Earth causes Bruised, Lightning causes Shocked, Wind causes Bleeding, and Non-Elemental causes Concussed.
    You can apply this effect only once per turn and can only apply one rank of this status per turn, no matter how many hits the jutsu has.
    Additionally, you gain one release of your choice.

  • Eloquence: You've learned the art of words and beauty, enhancing your skills with Genjutsu.
    Choose one of the Genjutsu keywords: Auditory, Visual, Inhaled, or Tactile.
    You can either add that trait to any Genjutsu or swap one of its original traits for the chosen one.
